creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yes you are right, it is the same package.
But if you want to add new OPTIONS you have to bump PORTREVISION.

Palle Girgensohn wrote:
> I don't think we need to bump PORTREVISION for this?
> 
> $ pkg_version -t 8.3.r1 8.3RC1
> =
> $
> 
> So, it is basically the same package that is installed?
> 
> /Palle
>
